ddls:
CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the student */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the student */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the student */,
  "birthdate" TEXT /* Date of birth of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "address" TEXT /* Home address of the student */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the student or their guardian */,
  "guardian_name" TEXT /* Name of the student's guardian */,
  "guardian_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the guardian */,
  "emergency_contact" TEXT /* Emergency contact information */,
  "grade_level" TEXT /* Current grade level of the student */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the student's primary class */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "personality_traits" (
  "trait_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trait record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the student */,
  "extro" REAL /* Score on extroversion scale */,
  "open" REAL /* Score on openness scale */,
  "agree" REAL /* Score on agreeableness scale */,
  "social" REAL /* Score on social interaction scale */,
  "date_assessed" TEXT /* Date when the personality traits were assessed */,
  "assessor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the person who assessed the traits */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trait_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_personality_traits_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_personality_traits_assessor_id FOREIGN KEY ("assessor_id") REFERENCES teachers ("teacher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "classes" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each class */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the class */,
  "grade_level" TEXT /* Grade level of the class (e.g., IV, VI) */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school where the class is held */,
  "teacher_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the primary teacher of the class */,
  "class_size" INTEGER /* Number of students in the class */,
  "class_room" TEXT /* Room number where the class is held */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_classes_teacher_id FOREIGN KEY ("teacher_id") REFERENCES teachers ("teacher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_classes_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "schools" (
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each school */,
  "school_name" TEXT /* Name of the school */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the school */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the school */,
  "principal_name" TEXT /* Name of the school principal */,
  "principal_email" TEXT /* Contact email of the school principal */,
  "principal_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the school principal */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the student */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the class */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date when the student enrolled in the class */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the enrollment (e.g., active, withdrawn) */,
  "enrollment_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the enrollment (e.g., transfer, new student) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("class_id") REFERENCES classes ("class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teachers" (
  "teacher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each teacher */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the teacher */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the teacher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the teacher */,
  "subject" TEXT /* Subject taught by the teacher */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the teacher (e.g., head of department, counselor) */,
  "years_of_experience" INTEGER /* Number of years the teacher has been teaching */,
  "certifications" TEXT /* Any additional certifications the teacher holds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("teacher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teacher_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "teacher_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the teacher */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the class assigned */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the teacher started the assignment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the teacher's assignment ends */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teacher_assignments_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("class_id") REFERENCES classes ("class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teacher_assignments_teacher_id FOREIGN KEY ("teacher_id") REFERENCES teachers ("teacher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "engagement_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engagement metric record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the student */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the class */,
  "participation_score" REAL /* Score indicating participation in class activities */,
  "homework_submission_rate" REAL /* Rate of homework submissions */,
  "attendance_rate" REAL /* Rate of student attendance in the class */,
  "test_scores" REAL /* Average test scores of the student in the class */,
  "project_participation" REAL /* Participation in class projects */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_engagement_metrics_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("class_id") REFERENCES classes ("class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_engagement_metrics_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interventions" (
  "intervention_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each intervention */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the student */,
  "intervention_type" TEXT /* Type of intervention planned (e.g., counseling, tutoring) */,
  "date_scheduled" TEXT /* Scheduled date for the intervention */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the intervention (e.g., planned, in progress, completed) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or observations related to the intervention */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("intervention_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interventions_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the student */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the class */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback provided */,
  "date_submitted" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was submitted */,
  "teacher_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the teacher who provided the feedback */,
  "feedback_type" TEXT /* Type of feedback (e.g., positive, constructive, concern) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("class_id") REFERENCES classes ("class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_teacher_id FOREIGN KEY ("teacher_id") REFERENCES teachers ("teacher_id")
)
